description: Enables Virtualization-Based Security (VBS), Secure Boot + DMA platform security, and Hypervisor-Protected Code Integrity (HVCI). Start with HVCI in Audit mode, switch to Enforce after driver validation.

omaSettings.description: 1 = Enable VBS. Requires UEFI Secure Boot and a compatible CPU with hardware virtualization.
1 = Secure Boot only (anbefalt default — DMA/IOMMU ikke tilgjengelig på alle enheter). 3 = Secure Boot + DMA Protection (kun hvis AvailableSecurityProperties inneholder verdi 3).
0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled with UEFI lock (cannot be disabled without physical access), 2 = Enabled without UEFI lock (Audit mode). Start with 2, move to 1 after driver validation.
1 = Enabled with UEFI lock. Protects LSASS/credentials using VBS.
1 = Enabled. Requires Intel TXT or AMD SVM/SEV-capable CPU.
